role: IRGC Commander, East Azerbaijan Province (d. 21 March 2026)
bio: Ghadir Azarian served as the [IRGC](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps) provincial commander in East Azerbaijan Province. He was killed on 21 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave).
editorial_notes: Killed 21 March 2026. IRGC commander, East Azerbaijan Province.
